summary: IBT (Inter-Branch Transfer) Module testing completed. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified and working correctly. All 6 new IBT features tested and functional.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement needed

tags in detail dialog
critical_code_review_comments: All 20 backend API tests passed - IBT module fully functional
Inventory validation on create working - rejects insufficient stock with detailed error
Same branch validation working - rejects source=destination
Transit details (vehicle, driver, ETA) captured correctly on create and dispatch
Status flow INITIATED -> APPROVED -> IN_TRANSIT -> COMPLETED working correctly
Inventory deduction on dispatch working - stock reduced from source branch
Inventory addition on receive working - stock added to destination branch
Shortage/variance logging working - creates ibt_shortages record when received < dispatched
Cancel before dispatch allowed, cancel after dispatch correctly rejected
IBT shortages endpoint returns pending investigation records
Frontend IBT page loads with data-testid='ibt-page'
Summary cards show correct counts (Total, Pending, In Transit, Completed, Shortages)
Shortage alert banner displays pending investigation count
Create dialog has all required fields including transit details section
Inventory check displays available stock in real-time when source branch and item selected
Dispatch dialog shows warning about inventory deduction
Receive dialog allows entering actual received quantity with damage/receipt notes
Filter cards work correctly to filter transfers by status
Transfer detail dialog shows full timeline and transit details

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements verified, all dialogs working)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test IBT transfers created during testing with notes containing TEST_* prefix. Test item: INP_654 at Unit 1 Vedica.
context_for_next_testing_agent: IBT module fully tested. Key verifications: 1) Inventory check endpoint /api/ibt-transfers/check-inventory/{type}/{item}/{branch} working. 2) Create IBT validates inventory and rejects insufficient stock. 3) Status flow: INITIATED -> APPROVED -> IN_TRANSIT -> COMPLETED. 4) Dispatch deducts from source inventory. 5) Receive adds to destination inventory. 6) Shortage records created in ibt_shortages collection when variance > 0. 7) Cancel only allowed before dispatch. 8) Frontend shows shortage alert, summary cards, filter cards, and all dialogs working. Test branches: Unit 1 Vedica, Unit 2 Trikes, Unit 3 TM. Test item: INP_654.

backend_api.GET /api/branches/names: PASS - Returns branch list for dropdowns
backend_api.GET /api/raw-materials: PASS - Returns RM list for item selection

ibt_features_verification.3_transit_tracking_details: PASS - Vehicle, driver name, driver contact, expected arrival captured
